title: Marketplace Manager - Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions!
